verses.text: “Biakna tau ding singkha sing tawh bawl in. Pi sagih leh alang sau-in pi sagih leh alang mah na zaisak ding hi. Biakna tau a ning kikim ding a, a tun' pi li leh alang hi ding hi
A kiu lite-ah ki na bawl ding hi. A kite pen a biakna tau tawh sakhat hi ding a, sumngo tawh na zut ding hi
Ama-a' dingin vut koihna ding beelte leh kawbiate, kuangte, sikkate leh vutluahna peekte na bawl ding a, a nazat khempeuh sumngo tawh na bawl ding hi
Ama-a' dingin siklen, a vang simsiam zong sumngo tawh na bawl ding hi. Siklen tung, a kiu lite-ah sumngo kual li na bawl ding hi
Siklen in biakna tau kimciang a batsuk theihna dingin biakna tau zawl nuai panin na bulh ding hi
Biakna tau-a' dingin singkha sing zawlte bawlin sumngo tawh tuate na zut ding hi
A kipuak ciangin biakna tau pang nihte-ah a zawlte a om theihna dingin a kualte' vang sungah a zawlte kikhum ding hi
Singpekte tawh kuak nei-in biakna tau na bawl ding a, mualtunga nang tungah hong kilaksa bangin kibawl ding hi.
“Biakbuk tual na bawl ding hi. A tual in leitaw lam pangah pang khat-a' dingin pi za leh sawmnga a sau, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan a kikhai suk dalna puan nei ding hi
A khuam sawmnih leh a bullen sawmnih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding a, ahih hangin khuampi tunga vankhainate leh a gaknate pen ngun tawh a kibawl hi ding hi

Leilu lampanga ding zong a sauna tua bangmah hi-in, a kikhai suk dalna puan pi za leh sawmnga sau ding a, a khuam sawmnih leh a bullen sawmnih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding hi. Ahi zongin khuampi tunga vankhainate leh a gaknate pen ngun tawh a kibawl hi ding hi
Nitumna lam pangah buktual a vailam-a' dingin khuampi sawm leh bullen sawmte tawh pi sawmsagih leh nga a sau a kikhai suk dalna puan om ding hi
A mailam, nisuahna lam buktual a vailam pi sawmsagih leh nga hi ding hi
Kongpi pang khat-a ding a kikhaisuk dalna puan pi sawmnihlenih leh alang hi ding a, khuampi thum leh bullen thumte tawh hi ding hi
A pang langkhatah a kikhaisuk dalna puan pen pi sawmnihlenih leh alang hi ding a, khuampi thum leh bullen thumte tawh hi ding hi

Buktuala kongpi dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khau a kopin a kikhuk khau hoihte tawh a kigan, phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem, pi sawmthum a sau kongpuankhai khat om ding a, tua in khuampi li leh bullen li nei ding hi
Buktual kiima khuampi khempeuh ngun tawh kibawl gakna tawh kigak ding a, a vankhainate ngun hi-in a bullente sumngo hi ding hi
Buktual a dung pi za leh sawmnga, a vai pi sawmsagih leh nga, a san'na pi sagih leh alang hi-in, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan a kikhaisuk dalna puan leh sumngo bullente tawh hi ding hi
Biakbuk nazat ding peuhmahte leh a khetphimte khempeuh leh buktuala khetphimte khempeuh sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding hi.
“Meivak a kuangin a om tawntung theihna dingin mei-a vak ding oliv gah a kisuzan, sathau siangtho, Israel mite in nang kiangah hong paipihna dingun thu na pia ding hi

Kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna singkuang mai-a dalna puan pualamah, Aaron leh ama tapate in nitak-a kipan zingsang dong Topa' mai-ah vil ding uh hi. Tua pen Israel mite in amau' khang tawntungin a zuih ding uh ngeina kip khat hi ding hi.
